title: Close Cabinet-Bureau outcome feedback loop
goal: Define the return path from Bureau/Grabowski execution evidence to Cabinet outcomes and Heimlern proposal-only learning input.

metadata.safety_boundary: gated design and registration only; no dispatch, merge, runtime mutation, credential exposure or automatic queue mutation

acceptance.assertion: Outcome records distinguish completed, blocked, failed, superseded and false-positive findings with evidence.
Bureau receipts can be referenced by Cabinet without Bureau writing Cabinet truth directly.
Heimlern receives only closed outcomes and may produce proposed adjustments, not active policy changes.
Learning proposals must include minimum case count, confidence and known bias limits.
